question: In what specific setting did Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy state that Ukraine needs Donald Trump on its side?
answer: He made the statement while speaking at a podium with the European Council logo during a formal event in Brussels.

video: A man stands at a podium with the European Council logo behind him, speaking into a microphone during a formal event.
text: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy stated at an EU summit in Brussels that Ukraine needs Donald Trump on its side.
